titleStmt.title: SII 15.240: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 240. (B.K. No. 57 of 1926-27.) HARTI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the temple of Īśvara.
This is dated the 7th regnal year of the Sinda feudatory, Vijaya, Kārttika-puṇṇami, Monday, corresponding to 1173 A.D., October 22.

It records the gift of income from the Bīravaṇa tax on the garden of the god to the god Gōyidēśvara by the twelve gāvuṇḍas of Harati, Aṟuvattokkalu, Ugura Three-Hundred, the One Thousand and Heggaḍe Remmarasa after washing the feet of Jātavēda-paṇḍita, the Āchārya of the temple. Another gift to the same god by Maduvarasa is also registered.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṇḍa
ḷēśvara śāhaśōttuṁga bhujabaḷabhīma vīrabijjaṇadēva
varuśada 7 neya vijayasaṁvatsarada kārttika suddha puṁ
ṇṇami sōmavāra vyatīpāta saṁkrānti saṁyyōga
māda puṇyadinadoḷu śrīmatu haratiya ha
nnirbbarggāvuṁḍagaḷuṁ Aṟuvattokkaluṁ Uguramūnū
rvvaruṁ sāsirvveruṁ mukhyavāgi haṭṭagāṟa bīravaṇada
heggaḍe reṁmarasaṁ gōyidēsvaradēvarācāryyarjjātavē
dapaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi dēvara
tōṁṭṭada hēṟina bīravaṇamaṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi biṭṭa
ru . © svasti śrīmatu soraṭṭūra mahāprabhu rājaṁ
gaḷa māva maduvarasaṁ ggōyidēśvaradēvara tōṁṭṭada hē
ṟina hāgamaṁ sarvva namasyavāgi dēvara naṁdā
dīvigege biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.240 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
